expected_buckets.role_frame: fellow software engineer and a brother in Christ
expected_buckets.relation_anchor: We go to the same church, and he's become the friend I kayak with
voice_lift: Speaks simply and clearly about complex technical topics
expected_buckets.wound_longing: doesn't have a vocabulary yet for some of what he feels most
fact_atom: human being should never be handled more than they're loved

rationale_notes: Aaron's wound_longing falls back to the wound side because no clean longing-coded sentence is present in his identity prose; the paired selector correctly does not fabricate a longing half.

moral_theological_position lands on the role-frame line because Aaron's Christological substrate is woven into his introduction; this is intentional, not a misclassification — the role-frame and theological position genuinely co-locate.

embodied_marker is intentionally minimal — Aaron's identity prose is concept-heavy rather than physical-detail-heavy, and the only embodied marker present in backstory_facts is 'Wears glasses'. The harness honors that sparseness rather than padding.
refusal_shape collects the single prose-extracted line 'no instinct to force closeness' because Aaron has no boundaries[]. The needle is a kept refusal-marker, not an over-broad match.
